message:
feat(mermaid): add gitGraph layout engine + renderer (bd-hudcn.1.7.2)

Implement lane-based layout and terminal rendering for gitGraph diagrams:

Layout (mermaid_layout.rs):
- Lane assignment via cluster membership (branches = lanes)
- Topological ordering for vertical commit placement
- Cross-lane merge routing with horizontal-step waypoints
- Content-aware label placement to the right of commit nodes
- Deterministic output for identical inputs

Renderer (mermaid_render.rs):
- Branch lane lines with per-lane coloring (6-color palette)
- Commit node glyphs: filled circle (Unicode) / asterisk (ASCII)
- Label rendering with truncation for narrow terminals
- Dedicated render path bypassing generic node/edge rendering

Tests: 5 layout tests covering empty, single commit, linear chain,
branch/merge with clusters, and deterministic reproducibility.

All 608 tests pass (599 existing + 4 parser + 5 new layout), clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
